svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="三层下钻" id="lt3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-454" dy="-134" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="第一层：看 P99 而非均值
均值 200ms 掩盖了 P99 = 1.5s
每 100 个请求有 1 个用户等 1.5 秒" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="60" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="第二层：链路追踪拆耗时
trace 显示：网关 5ms + 应用 50ms
+ 分布式锁等待 1100ms = 1.2s
瓶颈 = 锁等待" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="300" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="第三层：监控交叉验证
P99 飙升同时刻：
Redis 命中率 92% → 68%
锁竞争 → 缓存击穿 → 连环效应" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="300" x="60" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="l1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="l2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="l2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="l3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontColor=#b45309;fontSize=11;" value="知道慢，不知哪儿慢" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="220" x="440" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontColor=#b45309;fontSize=11;" value="知道链路，不知全局影响" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="220" x="440" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="根因：锁竞争引发缓存击穿" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="260" x="440" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="三层从粗到细：现象 → 链路 → 根因。缺任何一层，定位都停在半路。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="740" x="60" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第一层：看 P99 而非均值
均值 200ms 掩盖了 P99 = 1.5s
每 100 个请求有 1 个用户等 1.5 秒

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 127px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第二层：链路追踪拆耗时
trace 显示：网关 5ms + 应用 50ms
+ 分布式锁等待 1100ms = 1.2s
瓶颈 = 锁等待

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 257px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第三层：监控交叉验证
P99 飙升同时刻：
Redis 命中率 92% → 68%
锁竞争 → 缓存击穿 → 连环效应

div.div: 三层从粗到细：现象 → 链路 → 根因。缺任何一层，定位都停在半路。
